flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Averett University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Averett University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (41.7% → 48.1%).

flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Averett University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 1.2k).
